ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transport_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the record */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the vehicle's position */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the vehicle's position */,
  "base_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the base station */,
  "weekday" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the month */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the timestamp */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the timestamp */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the timestamp */,
  "vehicle_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the vehicle */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle at the recorded time */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the vehicle */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transport_data_base_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_id") REFERENCES bases ("base_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transport_data_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES route_plans ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transport_data_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bases" (
  "base_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each base station */,
  "base_name" TEXT /* Name of the base station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the base station */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the base station */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the base station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("base_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle (e.g., bus, train) */,
  "base_id" TEXT /* Base station identifier where the vehicle is assigned */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the vehicle */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Total distance traveled by the vehicle */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., active, maintenance, out of service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "vehicle_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the vehicle making the trip */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trip */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Starting location of the trip */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Ending location of the trip */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the route */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers on the trip */,
  "estimated_duration" TEXT /* Estimated duration of the trip */,
  "actual_duration" TEXT /* Actual duration of the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES route_plans ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic condition record */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Datetime when the condition was recorded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the traffic condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the traffic condition (e.g., congestion, accident) */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Severity of the traffic condition */,
  "estimated_duration" TEXT /* Estimated duration of the traffic condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_plans" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route plan */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip associated with this route plan */,
  "waypoints" TEXT /* List of waypoints for the route in JSON format */,
  "estimated_duration" TEXT /* Estimated duration of the route */,
  "total_distance" TEXT /* Total distance of the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_plans_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service schedule */,
  "vehicle_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the vehicle associated with this schedule */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the service */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the service */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the service (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the route */,
  "days_of_week" TEXT /* Days of the week the service is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_schedules_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_schedules_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES route_plans ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Datetime when the incident occurred */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the incident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Severity of the incident */,
  "estimated_duration" TEXT /* Estimated duration of the incident */,
  "affected_vehicles" TEXT /* List of vehicles affected by the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" TEXT /* ID of the vehicle being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
